name: Furry world (RPG)
description:
WELCOME TO FURGAY

(AKA) the town you begin in.

The world is populated with furries, half breeds and a phew humans.

pick your species and meet a large cast of characters, you begin your story in Furgay, after finally finishing college and released in the world (for better or for worst) and you choose where the story goes
